children.text: Dad: What are you doing, Lingling?
children.notes: What are you doing? 你在做什么？
children.statement: Dad is asking Lingling a question.
children.explanation: 爸爸在询问玲玲正在做什么。

children.text: Lingling: I'm writing goodbye letters to all my friends at school.
children.cn: 玲玲：我正在给学校所有的朋友写告别信。
children.notes: writing 正在写；goodbye letters 告别信
children.statement: Lingling is writing to only one friend.
children.explanation: 玲玲是写给 all my friends (所有的朋友)。

children.text: Dad: What are you writing in your letters?
children.cn: 爸爸：你在信里写什么呢？
children.statement: Dad wants to know the content of the letters.

children.text: Lingling: Well, first I write the name of a friend.
children.cn: 玲玲：嗯，首先我写下一个朋友的名字。

children.text: Lingling: And then I write "Wishing you happiness every day" in every letter.
children.cn: 玲玲：然后我在每封信里都写上“祝你天天开心”。
children.notes: then 然后；wishing you 祝愿你
children.statement: Lingling writes the same wish in every letter.
children.explanation: 玲玲在每封信里都写同样的祝愿。

children.text: Dad: Wow! There are about forty letters here.
children.cn: 爸爸：哇！这儿大约有四十封信。
children.explanation: 文中说的是 forty (四十) 封信。
